nodes.text: SHH! Did you hear that? The walls are whispering again.
Oh. You're not a wall-person. You're just a small goblin.
Never mind the walls. They only whisper to me anyway.
Here. Take this spoon. It's magic. Probably. I found it in a tree.
You still have the spoon! Have you tried eating soup with it? Soup tastes better when it's magical.
You lost the spoon! That's okay. The spoon was always more of a... concept.
